plan: In CombinedExpression.resolve_expression (django/db/models/expressions.py), after resolving lhs/rhs, detect the connector==SUB case where both sides are the same temporal type (DateField/DateTimeField/TimeField) and return TemporalSubtraction(lhs, rhs).resolve_expression(...) instead of the plain CombinedExpression, so the DurationField output_field is known before _resolve_output_field raises the mixed-types FieldError. Move/remove the equivalent datetime-subtraction check currently living in CombinedExpression.as_sql (and the has_native_duration_field DurationExpression dispatch can similarly move to resolve time), since resolution now happens earlier. Add regression tests in tests/expressions/tests.py annotating F('end') - F('start') (plus adding a timedelta Value) without ExpressionWrapper.
